title: Velu Configuration
description: Configuration schema for velu.json — the core config file for Velu documentation sites.

$schema.description: Path or URL to the JSON schema for editor validation.

theme.description: Named theme preset that controls the overall look and feel. Supports Fumadocs presets and legacy Velu aliases.

primary.description: Primary brand color (hex). Used as accent in both light and dark modes unless overridden.

light.description: Accent color for light mode (hex). Overrides primary in light mode.

dark.description: Accent color for dark mode (hex). Overrides primary in dark mode.

icons.description: Icon settings compatible with Mint-style configuration.

library.description: Icon library used for named icon strings.

theme.description: Shiki theme for syntax highlighting. Use a string for a single theme, or an object with light/dark keys.

languages.description: Supported language codes (e.g. ["en", "es", "ja"]). The first is the default. Display labels are auto-derived.

items.description: BCP 47 language code (e.g. en, es, fr, ja, zh).

openapi.description: Default OpenAPI source used by API pages.

api.description: API playground and MDX endpoint settings.

baseUrl.description: Base API URL used by generated examples.

proxy.description: Whether to send playground requests through the proxy endpoint. Defaults to true.

defaults.description: Whether examples should prioritize required-only or all parameters.

prefill.description: Whether to prefill playground fields from schema examples.

autogenerate.description: Whether to autogenerate API code samples from OpenAPI operations.

mdx.description: Defaults for manually-authored MDX API endpoint pages.

server.description: Server URL prepended to relative `api` frontmatter paths. Supports one server URL or multiple server URLs.

seo.description: SEO configuration for metadata and indexing behavior.

redirects.description: Permanent or temporary redirects for moved pages.

navigation.description: Defines the site navigation hierarchy. Use 'tabs' for single-language sites, or 'languages' for per-language navigation (like Mintlify).

openapi.description: Default OpenAPI source inherited by tabs/groups/pages in this navigation section.

tabs.description: Top-level navigation tabs (single-language mode). Ignored when 'languages' is present.

dropdowns.description: Top-level dropdown containers. Each dropdown can include groups, pages, anchors, or links.

groups.description: Top-level sidebar groups when tabs/dropdowns are not used.

pages.description: Top-level pages when tabs/dropdowns are not used.

languages.description: Per-language navigation. Each entry defines tabs/groups/pages for one language. First entry is the default language (no URL prefix).

products.description: Multi-product navigation. Each product can define its own tabs or top-level pages.

versions.description: Versioned navigation. Each version defines its own set of tabs.

anchors.description: Prominent external links displayed in the navbar (e.g. GitHub, Discord).

global.description: Cross-cutting navigation elements visible on every page.

tabs.description: Global external tabs shown across all pages.

anchors.description: Global anchors shown across all tabs.

asyncapi.description: Default AsyncAPI source inherited by tabs/groups/pages in this navigation section.
Default AsyncAPI source used by API pages.

seoConfig.description: SEO settings including global metatags and indexing policy.

metatags.description: Global metatags applied to page metadata. Keys are tag names (for example 'og:title' or 'twitter:card').

indexing.description: Controls which pages are included in generated indexing outputs like sitemap and llms files.

openapiSource.description: OpenAPI source value. Supports a spec URL/path, a list of sources, or an object form.

directory.description: Optional directory for generated OpenAPI pages.

page.description: Explicit markdown file path relative to the docs directory (without .md extension). No automatic language fallback is applied. Example: 'quickstart' → docs/quickstart.md, 'ja/quickstart' → docs/ja/quickstart.md, 'writing-content/page' → docs/writing-content/page.md.

href.description: Navigation link target. Supports absolute URLs and internal paths (for example '/changelog' or 'guides/intro').

redirect.description: Redirect rule for moved, renamed, or deleted pages.

source.description: Source path to match. Query params and anchors are not supported.

destination.description: Destination path or absolute URL. Query params and anchors are not supported.

permanent.description: Whether to use a permanent redirect status. Defaults to true.

group.description: A group of pages, optionally nested.

slug.description: URL slug prefix for pages in this group. Used as the route prefix: /<slug>/<page-basename>.

iconType.description: Icon style hint (primarily for Font Awesome).

tag.description: Optional badge/tag label displayed next to the group name.

expanded.description: Whether the group is expanded by default. Defaults to true.

description.description: Optional description displayed below the group name.

hidden.description: Whether the group is hidden from navigation. Defaults to false.

openapi.description: Default OpenAPI source inherited by page entries in this group.

pages.description: Pages, nested groups, separators, or external links within this group.

asyncapi.description: Default AsyncAPI source inherited by page entries in this group.

version.description: Optional version label inherited by generated OpenAPI operation pages under this tab.

slug.description: Optional URL slug prefix for pages in this tab. If omitted, Velu derives one from the tab label.

iconType.description: Icon style hint (primarily for Font Awesome).

openapi.description: Default OpenAPI source inherited by groups/pages in this tab.

pages.description: Standalone pages, separators, or external links directly under this tab.

groups.description: Groups of pages under this tab.

menu.description: Optional menu items for this tab. Each menu item is normalized into a sidebar group.

asyncapi.description: Default AsyncAPI source inherited by groups/pages in this tab.

slug.description: Optional URL slug for this dropdown.

iconType.description: Icon style hint (primarily for Font Awesome).

openapi.description: Default OpenAPI source inherited by groups/pages in this dropdown.

menu.description: Menu items nested under this dropdown.

asyncapi.description: Default AsyncAPI source inherited by groups/pages in this dropdown.

menuItem.description: A named menu item within a tab. Normalized into a sidebar group.

item.description: Display label for the menu item.

icon.description: Icon identifier for the menu item.

iconType.description: Icon style hint (primarily for Font Awesome).

openapi.description: Default OpenAPI source inherited by groups/pages in this menu item.

pages.description: Pages directly under this menu item.

groups.description: Groups nested under this menu item.

asyncapi.description: Default AsyncAPI source inherited by groups/pages in this menu item.

separator.description: A visual separator/label in the sidebar navigation.

link.description: An external link displayed in the sidebar.

iconType.description: Icon style hint (primarily for Font Awesome).

anchor.description: A prominent navigation anchor. Can be an external link or a container of tabs.

version.description: Optional version label inherited by generated OpenAPI operation pages under this anchor.

openapi.description: Default OpenAPI source inherited by tabs/groups/pages in this anchor.

tabs.description: Optional tabs promoted to top-level navigation under this anchor.

menu.description: Menu items nested under this anchor.

iconType.description: Icon style hint (primarily for Font Awesome).

color.description: Optional light/dark color hints for displaying this anchor.

hidden.description: Whether the anchor is hidden. Defaults to false.

asyncapi.description: Default AsyncAPI source inherited by tabs/groups/pages in this anchor.

productNav.description: Navigation definition for a product docs area.

product.description: Product label (used for route prefix derivation).

iconType.description: Icon style hint (primarily for Font Awesome).

name.description: Optional display name for the product.

hidden.description: Whether this product is hidden from navigation. Defaults to false.

color.description: Optional light/dark color hints for this product.

openapi.description: Default OpenAPI source inherited by tabs/groups/pages in this product.

pages.description: Pages directly under this product when tabs are not needed.

menu.description: Menu items directly within this product.

asyncapi.description: Default AsyncAPI source inherited by tabs/groups/pages in this product.

versionNav.description: Navigation definition for a specific docs version.

version.description: Version label (used for route prefix derivation).

default.description: Whether this is the default version.

hidden.description: Whether this version is hidden from navigation. Defaults to false.

openapi.description: Default OpenAPI source inherited by tabs/groups/pages in this version.

asyncapi.description: Default AsyncAPI source inherited by tabs/groups/pages in this version.

globalTab.description: Global external tab shown in the navbar across all pages.

tab.description: Display name for the global tab.

icon.description: Icon identifier for the global tab.

iconType.description: Icon style hint (primarily for Font Awesome).

languageNav.description: Per-language navigation entry. Defines the full tab/group/page structure for one language.

language.description: BCP 47 language code (e.g. en, es, ja).

default.description: Whether this is the default language.

hidden.description: Whether this language is hidden from navigation. Defaults to false.

openapi.description: Default OpenAPI source inherited by tabs/groups/pages in this language entry.

asyncapi.description: Default AsyncAPI source inherited by tabs/groups/pages in this language entry.
